title: Slash SaaS Costs: Build Your Own AI CRM with Chinese Models! #shorts
summary: Organizations are shifting away from expensive SaaS CRM solutions toward building custom AI-powered alternatives using cost-effective Chinese AI models. This reflects a broader trend of companies pursuing in-house solutions to reduce technology costs.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof covers the shift away from expensive SaaS CRM products toward custom, AI-powered alternatives built on lower-cost Chinese AI models. It matters because it frames in-house development as a way to cut recurring software spend, part of a wider move toward building rather than buying enterprise tools. The takeaway: organizations can reduce technology costs by combining custom CRM builds with cheaper model options and local inference.
